name: Switchover
overview: Anna's return to Bandung brought happiness to Jones, her father. They will start a new life and repeat the precious moments lost since Jones decided to divorce from Mrs. Anna. Unfortunately, Anna didn't feel that way. Whether at home with Jones or on campus, Anna feels out of place. Especially after Jones is declared dead, and his death is related to the most terrible motorcycle gang in Bandung, Griffin, which is led by… Leo, Anna's enemy on campus.

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | Switchover | Adhisty Zara, Emir Mahira, Fadly Faisal, Fatih Unru, I.X.Julian Jacob
